scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix apps/landing && npm install --prefix apps/customer && npm install --prefix apps/admin && npm install --prefix apps/partner && npm install --prefix apps/shipper
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix apps/landing" "npm run dev --prefix apps/customer" "npm run dev --prefix apps/admin" "npm run dev --prefix apps/partner" "npm run dev --prefix apps/shipper"
